overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a slow aerial approach to a massive industrial capital spaceship in deep space. The camera moves steadily from the ship's rear engine section past large spherical containment domes toward the forward command towers, set against a warm brown nebula backdrop with detailed sci-fi architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space rear approach to capital ship engine section

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the massive capital ship from the rear, maintaining steady forward trajectory along the ship's central axis toward the engine thrusters

entered.detail: kilometer-scale industrial warship with detailed hull plating and greebled surface architecture
large circular docking or habitation ring attached to the ship's port side rear
massive rear propulsion array with glowing blue exhaust ports and heat radiators

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady drone-like approach toward the rear of a massive industrial capital ship. The circular ring structure is visible to the left while blue-glowing engine thrusters dominate the center view. The ship's detailed hull architecture becomes progressively larger as the camera advances through the starfield against a warm nebula backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: midship passage between spherical containment domes

events.description: blue electrical energy arcs across the ship's superstructure between the spherical domes
camera passes between the two massive spherical dome structures on port and starboard sides

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward between the ship's massive spherical containment domes, observing the electrical discharge effects and superstructure details

entered.detail: massive spherical containment structure with ringed equatorial band on the port side
massive spherical containment structure with ringed equatorial band on the starboard side
central connecting spine with trusswork and industrial piping running between the domes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the midship section, passing between two enormous spherical containment domes on either side. A sudden blue electrical discharge arcs across the superstructure at 18 seconds. The ship's industrial architecture and greebled surface details are prominently visible as the camera maintains its forward trajectory through the ship's spine.

scene_state.functional_zone: forward command section with bridge towers

events.description: passing the spherical domes and entering the forward command tower section of the ship

agents.ego_description: approaching the forward command towers and bridge section, maintaining steady forward motion along the ship's axis

entered.detail: tall vertical command structures with antenna arrays and illuminated windows rising from the forward hull
forward command bridge with angular armored plating and sensor arrays

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the forward section of the ship, leaving the spherical domes behind. Tall command towers and the bridge structure rise ahead as the camera continues its approach. The industrial architecture becomes denser with antenna arrays and structural details visible against the nebula backdrop as the ship fills the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady aerial approach across the length of a massive industrial capital ship, moving from its glowing propulsion systems toward its command center. It begins with a drone-like advance toward the rear of the vessel, where blue-glowing engine thrusters and a circular ring structure dominate the view against a warm nebula backdrop. As the camera pushes forward into the midship section, it passes between two enormous spherical containment domes while a sudden blue electrical discharge arcs across the greebled superstructure. The scene then shifts toward the forward section, leaving the domes behind as tall command towers and the bridge structure rise into view. Finally, the camera closes in on the dense industrial architecture of the ship's bow, with antenna arrays and structural details filling the frame against the distant starfield.
